intro: Compare climate risk between ACT Remainder - Gungahlin, Australian Capital Territory and ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: ACT Remainder - Gungahlin has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is ACT Remainder - Gungahlin or ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Gungahlin has a flood risk score of 37/100, while ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Gungahlin scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.
